page_content:
GREK606 Greek Historians (3 Credits)

Survey of the Greek historians, concentrating on Herodotus and Thucydides, contrasting the two historians in the areas of subject, methods of research, composition, and achievement.

GREK672 History and Development of the Greek Language (3 Credits) Mastery of ancient Greek through grammar review, prose composition, and analysis of historical developments in Greek writers’ modes of expression.
